%% =============================================================================
%% Appendix: Brutal Per-Chapter / Per-Appendix Feedback (auto-generated)
%% =============================================================================

\section{Self-Assessment: Brutal Feedback per Chapter and Appendix}


\noindent\textbf{Purpose.} This appendix is provided to support transparency, traceability, reproducibility, and examination defensibility. The material contained herein supplements, but does not replace, the primary findings reported in Chapters~1--5. No major conclusions rely exclusively on appendix content.

\label{app:brutal_feedback}

\noindent Each chapter and appendix is scored on three dimensions:
heading quality, figure quality, and table quality. Each dimension
uses the rubric documented in the per-database CSV files
(\texttt{headings\_database.csv}, \texttt{figures\_database.csv},
\texttt{tables\_database.csv}). Score is the unweighted average
across all headings, figures, and tables in that location.

\textit{Grade key:} A $\geq 9.0$ | B $\geq 8.0$ | C $\geq 7.0$ | D $\geq 5.0$ | F $< 5.0$


\noindent Table~\ref{tab:brutal_chapters} summarises per-chapter brutal feedback for appendix review.
